offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual expense reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate expense reporting instead of manual expense tracking and reporting.
problem: Manual expense reporting is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for QuickBooks freelancers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about expense tracking
DM 20-50 freelancers with a demo video
Participate in community forums for freelancers
try_it: Let users try a simple expense entry form and summary email
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
